options.horizontalstretch.tooltip: Controls how far in the left/right corners you can see chunksections. 0% Is a full circle(vanilla), the higher the setting the more chunk sections on the corners skip rendering thus improving performance
options.verticalstretch.tooltip: Controls how far above/below you can see chunksections. 100% Is a full circle, the higher the setting the more chunk sections on the corners skip rendering thus improving performance
